title: [SBW] Survival Recipie Fix for Addons
description: This mod aims to add survival recipies to certain SBW addons mods.
body:
**The mod currently adds survival recipies for the following mods:**
- [SBW] Drone Detector
- [SBW] Frontline Combat Pack
- [SBW] WarBorn Drones

**Additionally the mod also fixes FCP vehicles only accepting creative ammo**

The WBD drones are crafted in the Vehicle Assembly Table.
Some civllian vehicles may appear in the land category.
